existing_assemblies.name: Architectural Shingle Roofing System
existing_assemblies.description: Premium 30-year architectural shingle roof installation, including leak barriers, underlayment, drip edges, and valley linings. This assembly is designed to provide high-wind resistance and architectural depth to residential structures.
existing_assemblies.contractorNotes: Verify roof pitch before climbing. Use safety harness tied off to certified anchor points. Ensure drip edges overlap by 2 inches.
existing_assemblies.typicalUseCase: Standard residential replacement or new construction roof installation.
existing_assemblies.proposalScopeOfWork: Furnish all labor, material, and equipment to install architectural shingles on designated roof surface.
existing_assemblies.proposalAssumptions: Assuming roof deck is structurally sound and requires no plywood sheet replacement.
existing_assemblies.proposalExclusions: Excludes gutter replacement and chimney structural repointing.
existing_assemblies.warrantyLanguage: 10-year contractor workmanship warranty plus manufacturer lifetime limited shingle warranty.
